'''鈭歵h-m-s-f''' ('''kathamsefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wetproof|wetproof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-m-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wetproof|wetproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-m-s-f
|-
! Lemma
| kathamsefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithamsefoko|thithamsefoko]] || [[word:jithamsefoko|jithamsefoko]] || [[word:shithamsefoko|shithamsefoko]] || [[word:kithamsefoko|kithamsefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothamsefoko|thothamsefoko]] || [[word:jothamsefoko|jothamsefoko]] || [[word:shothamsefoko|shothamsefoko]] || [[word:kothamsefoko|kothamsefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothamsefoko|thothamsefoko]] || [[word:jothamsefoko|jothamsefoko]] || [[word:shothamsefoko|shothamsefoko]] || [[word:kothamsefoko|kothamsefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thamsefoko|th忙thamsefoko]] || [[word:j忙thamsefoko|j忙thamsefoko]] || [[word:sh忙thamsefoko|sh忙thamsefoko]] || [[word:k忙thamsefoko|k忙thamsefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathamsefoko|thathamsefoko]] || [[word:jathamsefoko|jathamsefoko]] || [[word:shathamsefoko|shathamsefoko]] || [[word:kathamsefoko|kathamsefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathamsefoko|thathamsefoko]] || [[word:jathamsefoko|jathamsefoko]] || [[word:shathamsefoko|shathamsefoko]] || [[word:kathamsefoko|kathamsefoko]]
